name: create_price
description: Create a price for an existing Paddle product. Prices define how much to charge, in which currency, and whether the charge is one-time or recurring. A single product can have multiple prices for different billing intervals or currencies.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The ID of the product this price belongs to.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of this price, e.g. 'Monthly' or 'Annual'.

parameters.name: unit_price
parameters.description: The price amount with 'amount' (string, in smallest currency unit, e.g. cents) and 'currency_code' (ISO 4217).

parameters.name: billing_cycle
parameters.description: The billing cycle for recurring prices. Object with 'interval' ('month', 'year', 'week', 'day') and 'frequency' (integer). Omit for one-time prices.

parameters.name: trial_period
parameters.description: Free trial period. Object with 'interval' ('day', 'week', 'month') and 'frequency' (integer).

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Min and max quantity limits. Object with 'minimum' and 'maximum' integers.
